reconciliation_decision.reason: The sanitized public snapshot proves later-generation progress but does not contain candidate identities, parameters or monthly return paths. Importing synthetic rows would fabricate experiment memory and invalidate DSR/PBO. The v0.6 evidence is therefore preserved as an immutable legacy summary while a new predeclared sealed generation builds a complete auditable ledger.
reconciliation_decision.new_generation_holdout_policy: single-use after candidate-space exhaustion and frozen champion hash
